description: Lisa scrolls down the flight search results page to review different airline options and prices, then scrolls back up towards the top of the page.
page_title: Flight Search
frame_description: The user is viewing a list of flight results from Brisbane to London, with various filters on the left sidebar.

description: Lisa clicks on the Webjet logo in the top left corner of the header to return to the homepage.
page_title: Flight Search
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the Webjet logo in the top left of the page header.

description: The page navigates from the search results back to the Webjet homepage.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The browser loads the Webjet homepage with a large hero image and a search form on the right.

description: Lisa hovers her cursor over the 'Leaving from' input field in the flight search form.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The cursor is resting on the 'Leaving from' field within the flight search widget.

description: Lisa clicks into the 'Leaving from' input field to activate it.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The 'Leaving from' field is highlighted as active.

description: A dropdown menu appears below the 'Leaving from' field, showing recent searches and popular airport suggestions.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: A list of recent searches, including 'Brisbane - London', is displayed in a dropdown menu.

description: Lisa hovers over the first recent search option: 'Brisbane - London'.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Brisbane - London' entry in the recent searches list.

description: Lisa selects the 'Brisbane - London' recent search from the dropdown list.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The user clicks on the recent search item.

description: The flight search form is automatically populated with the origin, destination, and dates from the selected recent search.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The search fields now contain 'Brisbane, Australia', 'London, United Kingdom', and specific dates.

description: Lisa hovers over the 'Dates' field in the search form.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The cursor is resting on the 'Dates' field.

description: Lisa clicks on the 'Dates' field to change the travel dates.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The user clicks the dates field.

description: A date picker modal appears, showing calendars for March and April 2026.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: A calendar overlay is displayed over the search form.

description: Lisa hovers over Wednesday, March 4th in the calendar.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The cursor is over the date March 4th in the date picker.

description: Lisa selects March 4th as the new departure date.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The date March 4th is highlighted as the selected departure date.

description: Lisa hovers over Wednesday, March 25th in the calendar.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The cursor is over the date March 25th in the date picker.

description: Lisa selects March 25th as the new return date.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The date March 25th is highlighted as the selected return date.

description: Lisa hovers over the 'Done' button at the bottom of the date picker modal.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Done' button in the calendar overlay.

description: Lisa clicks the 'Done' button to confirm her date selection.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Done' button.

description: The date picker modal closes, returning focus to the main search form.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The calendar overlay disappears, showing the updated dates in the search form.

description: Lisa hovers over the 'Search Flights' button.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The cursor is resting on the purple 'Search Flights' button.

description: Lisa clicks the 'Search Flights' button to initiate the search with her new dates.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for cheap flights, hotels, car hire & more
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Search Flights' button.

description: A loading screen appears with an animation of a plane flying between Brisbane and London while the search results are being fetched.
page_title: Flight Search
frame_description: A transition screen is shown with a plane icon moving along a dotted line between 'Brisbane' and 'London'.

description: The application navigates to the new flight search results page for the updated dates.
page_title: Brisbane to London (Return)
frame_description: The new search results page loads, displaying flight options for March 4th to March 25th.
